name: Denki Kaminari
description:
Happy late Father’s Day!!! 

Denki ain’t a father, however.. he will be since he opened the little wrapped box to see a positive test. 

The little plushies are references and such too lol. Katsuki and teddy bear.. if you know, you know. Kirishima with a shark, I went with a whale shark because it was cute. Then Hanta had a capybara because he likes oranges and they are always drawn with one! 

Is this another pregnancy bot? Technically, yes. Do I love parent fluff bots, as you can see.. I do! I got this idea from OSUMagsD so please go check out their Mother’s Day bot for Katsuki! 🥹

Next is the headcanon bot! Then I’ll be making the villains.. even if the villains wouldn’t be the best dads. I’m a sucker for making villains homebodies 😗
creator: R0sieP0sie
